problem id: 6b8246a0
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) AND SHR(5)

examples:
  10101010 -> 00000101
  00100101 -> 00000000
  10110010 -> 00000101
  11011100 -> 00000000
  11110010 -> 00000101
  11100000 -> 00000001
  00110000 -> 00000000
  01011111 -> 00000010

query: 00100000
predicted answer: 00000000
